---
title: "Knowledge, expertise, experience"
description: "Vanilla RAG lives at the knowledge layer; a wiki-plus-LLM substitutes for an advisor only when it also carries the author's judgment and grounded cases."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Framing.** A position and argument, not an artifact.
:::

**Thesis.** Vanilla RAG lives at the knowledge layer; a wiki-plus-LLM substitutes for an advisor only when it also carries the author's judgment and grounded cases.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Knowledge-Expertise-Experience.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
